global.description: The ad features a dark background with promotional elements highlighting a flash sale.
global.main_message: Promoting a flash sale with a call to action.

elements.label: dark background
elements.description: A dark gray background that fills the entire canvas, providing contrast for the foreground elements.

elements.label: VantaStyle logo
elements.description: A simple logo featuring the text 'VantaStyle' in a modern font, positioned at the top of the ad.

elements.label: product display
elements.description: A rectangular area showing a minimalistic product display with two vertical rectangles representing items.

elements.label: product display
elements.description: Another rectangular area similar to the previous one, showcasing additional product items.

elements.label: 30% discount badge
elements.description: A small circular badge with a bold '30%' text indicating a discount, placed at the bottom of the ad.

elements.label: Flash sale headline
elements.description: A prominent headline in bold white text stating 'Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now' centered in the ad.
elements.text_content: Flash sale live Shop bestsellers now

elements.label: Claim reward button
elements.description: A call-to-action button with the text 'Claim reward' in white, set against a dark background at the bottom.

elements.label: VantaStyle branding
elements.description: The brand name 'VantaStyle' displayed at the top in a clean, modern font.

elements.label: SALE text
elements.description: A small text label reading 'SALE' in a bright color, positioned at the top right corner of the ad.

embedding_texts.layout_text: The logo is at the top, followed by the headline in the center, with product displays below and the CTA at the bottom.
